properties.property: You look upon the castle you first saw yesterday... You are filled with the power of immediate nostalgia.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] greets [[Kris]] and [[Susie]] again. He directs Kris to the [[school]]'s unused classroom to retrieve [[Card Kingdom]]'s [[Darkner]]s.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] tells [[Kris]] to bring [[Card Kingdom]]'s [[Darkner]]s from the [[school]]'s unused classroom to Castle Town.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] waits for [[Kris]] to return to the Dark World. She comments on [[Ralsei]]'s appearance and whether Kris hugged the [[Dummy]] in the next room.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] is given the option to hug the [[Dummy]].

property.name: description
property.value: Going into the light takes the [[party]] back to the School.
